user_features.skin_tone: Light to fair skin tone with a neutral-to-cool overall palette.
user_features.hairstyle: Short wavy bob with bangs, dark brown with reddish tones.
user_features.body_type_characteristics: Soft straight-to-slight-hourglass silhouette; the outfit emphasizes a defined waist with a fitted upper body and a relaxed, flowing lower half.

current_outfit.style: Minimal feminine summer outfit with a fitted tank top, high-waisted sheer maxi skirt, black shoulder bag, layered necklace, glasses, and playful statement shoes.
current_outfit.color: Predominantly white/ivory with black accents from the shoulder bag and cow-print shoes.
current_outfit.material: Lightweight cotton or knit sleeveless top paired with a sheer, airy lace or textured overlay skirt; leather-like black bag strap and soft footwear accents.

advantages: The all-white tonal outfit creates a clean, cohesive vertical line that feels fresh and elegant.
The fitted sleeveless top balances well with the flowy long skirt, giving the silhouette definition at the waist while keeping the look relaxed.
areas_for_improvement: The skirt length sits very close to the shoes, so a slightly shorter hem or a small heel could prevent the outfit from looking heavy at the bottom.
Adding a subtle contrast accessory, such as a slim belt or warmer-toned jewelry, could define the waist further and add more visual interest.
